title: Kardia Lexicon Category Entry
description: A single Hebrew thought category entry in the Kardia Lexicon

id.description: Lowercase transliterated Hebrew, URL-safe. Primary key.

hebrew_root.description: The Hebrew characters of the root word.

transliteration.description: Readable phonetic rendering for non-Hebrew readers.

testament_scope.description: Which Testament(s) this category actively appears in.

category_label.description: Short English label for UI display.

one_liner.description: Single sentence. What this word does, not what it means. Max 25 words.

full_definition.description: 2-4 paragraphs. Second Temple Hebrew perspective. No Western theological framing.

what_it_does.description: How this concept functions in covenant relationship. Action-oriented.

what_it_is_not.description: REQUIRED. Explicitly names the Western/Augustinian misreading and explains the distortion.

second_temple_context.description: How this concept functioned in Second Temple Jewish life.

kardia_rendering.description: Kardia translation preferred English rendering. Short phrase.

key_verses.description: OSIS format verse references. Example: Ps.136.1
